rdf:Description.dc:description: Cross-study comparison of normalised first natural frequency f_1/f_{1,0} versus S/D (manuscript submitted Fig 11). Single panel aggregating 9 literature series and the present study (T1-T5). Tripod-family (present study + Zaaijer tripod) drawn near-black with filled markers; monopile-family series drawn grey with open markers and dashed/dotted lines.
